mode.name: system_events_history
mode.query: SELECT EVENT_ID as ID, CREATED, PICKED_UP, COMPLETED, SUMMARY, HISTORY_TYPE, HISTORY_TYPE_NAME, HISTORY_STATUS, DETAILS FROM (SELECT SH.id EVENT_ID, SH.summary AS SUMMARY, NULL::timestamptz AS created, NULL::timestamptz AS picked_up, SH.created AS completed, -- view this as the "completed" date for sorting reasons NULL AS history_status, NULL AS history_type, NULL AS history_type_name, SH.details FROM rhnServerHistory SH WHERE SH.server_id = :sid UNION ALL SELECT SA.action_id AS EVENT_ID, AType.name || ' scheduled by ' || COALESCE(U.login, '(system)') AS SUMMARY, SA.created, SA.pickup_time AS picked_up, SA.completion_time AS completed, AStat.name AS history_status, AType.label AS history_type, AType.name AS history_type_name, NULL AS details FROM rhnServerAction SA JOIN rhnAction A ON SA.action_id = A.id JOIN rhnActionType AType ON A.action_type = AType.id JOIN rhnActionStatus AStat ON SA.status = AStat.id LEFT JOIN web_contact U ON A.scheduler = U.id WHERE SA.server_id = :sid AND SA.status IN (1, 2, 3) ) X ORDER BY COMPLETED DESC, PICKED_UP DESC, CREATED DESC, EVENT_ID DESC

datasource_modes.query: SELECT UAO.id, UAO.action_status, UAO.tally FROM rhnUserActionOverview UAO WHERE UAO.org_id = :org_id AND UAO.user_id = :user_id AND UAO.id IN (%s)

mode.name: recently_scheduled_action_list
mode.query: SELECT DISTINCT A.id AS id, A.earliest_action AS earliest, AT.name AS type_name, COALESCE(A.name, AT.name) AS action_name, A.scheduler AS scheduler, SA.status AS action_status_id FROM rhnAction A JOIN rhnActionType AT ON A.action_type = AT.id JOIN rhnServerAction SA ON A.id = SA.action_id WHERE A.org_id = :org_id AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM rhnUserServerPerms USP WHERE USP.user_id = :user_id AND USP.server_id = SA.server_id) AND A.created > current_timestamp - (:age * interval '1 day') ORDER BY id DESC

mode.name: pending_action_list
mode.query: WITH actionCounts AS ( SELECT id AS action_id, MAX(earliest_action) AS earliest_action, MAX(type_name) AS type_name, MAX(action_name) AS action_name, MAX(scheduler) AS scheduler, SUM(tally) AS total_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id IN (0, 1)) AS in_progress_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 2) AS completed_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 3) AS failed_systems FROM rhnUserActionOverview WHERE user_id = :user_id AND org_id = :org_id AND archived = 0 GROUP BY id ) SELECT AC.action_id AS ID, AC.earliest_action AS EARLIEST, A.prerequisite AS PREREQUISITE, COALESCE(PS.total_systems = PS.failed_systems, FALSE) AS PREREQUISITE_ALL_FAILED, AC.type_name, (CASE WHEN AC.action_name IS NULL THEN AC.type_name ELSE AC.action_name END) || ' scheduled by ' || (CASE WHEN WC.login IS NULL THEN '(unknown)' ELSE WC.login END) AS ACTION_NAME, AC.scheduler, WC.login AS SCHEDULER_NAME, COALESCE(AC.in_progress_systems, 0) AS "IN_PROGRESS_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.completed_systems, 0) AS "COMPLETED_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.failed_systems, 0) AS "FAILED_SYSTEMS" FROM actionCounts AC JOIN rhnAction A ON AC.action_id = A.id LEFT JOIN web_contact WC on AC.scheduler = WC.id LEFT JOIN actionCounts PS ON A.prerequisite = PS.action_id WHERE AC.in_progress_systems > 0 ORDER BY EARLIEST DESC

mode.name: pending_actions_in_set
mode.query: WITH actionCounts AS ( SELECT id AS action_id, MAX(earliest_action) AS earliest_action, MAX(type_name) AS type_name, MAX(action_name) AS action_name, MAX(scheduler) AS scheduler, SUM(tally) AS total_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id IN (0, 1)) AS in_progress_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 2) AS completed_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 3) AS failed_systems FROM rhnUserActionOverview WHERE user_id = :user_id AND org_id = :org_id AND archived = 0 GROUP BY id ) SELECT AC.action_id AS ID, AC.earliest_action AS EARLIEST, A.prerequisite AS PREREQUISITE, COALESCE(PS.total_systems = PS.failed_systems, FALSE) AS PREREQUISITE_ALL_FAILED, AC.type_name, (CASE WHEN AC.action_name IS NULL THEN AC.type_name ELSE AC.action_name END) AS ACTION_NAME, AC.scheduler, COALESCE(AC.in_progress_systems, 0) AS "IN_PROGRESS_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.completed_systems, 0) AS "COMPLETED_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.failed_systems, 0) AS "FAILED_SYSTEMS" FROM actionCounts AC JOIN rhnAction A ON AC.action_id = A.id JOIN rhnSet ST ON ST.element = AC.action_id LEFT JOIN actionCounts PS ON A.prerequisite = PS.action_id WHERE AC.in_progress_systems > 0 AND ST.user_id = :user_id AND ST.label = :set_label ORDER BY EARLIEST DESC

mode.name: all_action_list
mode.query: WITH actionCounts AS ( SELECT id AS action_id, MAX(earliest_action) AS earliest_action, MAX(type_name) AS type_name, MAX(action_name) AS action_name, MAX(scheduler) AS scheduler, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id IN (0, 1)) AS in_progress_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 2) AS completed_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 3) AS failed_systems FROM rhnUserActionOverview WHERE user_id = :user_id AND org_id = :org_id GROUP BY id ) SELECT AC.action_id AS ID, AC.earliest_action AS EARLIEST, AC.type_name, (CASE WHEN AC.action_name IS NULL THEN AC.type_name ELSE AC.action_name END) || ' scheduled by ' || (CASE WHEN WC.login IS NULL THEN '(unknown)' ELSE WC.login END) AS ACTION_NAME, AC.scheduler, WC.login AS SCHEDULER_NAME, COALESCE(AC.in_progress_systems, 0) AS "IN_PROGRESS_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.completed_systems, 0) AS "COMPLETED_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.failed_systems, 0) AS "FAILED_SYSTEMS" FROM actionCounts AC LEFT JOIN web_contact WC on AC.scheduler = WC.id ORDER BY EARLIEST DESC

mode.name: completed_action_list
mode.query: WITH actionCounts AS ( SELECT id AS action_id, MAX(earliest_action) AS earliest_action, MAX(type_name) AS type_name, MAX(action_name) AS action_name, MAX(scheduler) AS scheduler, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id IN (0, 1)) AS in_progress_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 2) AS completed_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 3) AS failed_systems FROM rhnUserActionOverview WHERE user_id = :user_id AND org_id = :org_id AND archived = 0 GROUP BY id ) SELECT AC.action_id AS ID, AC.earliest_action AS EARLIEST, AC.type_name, (CASE WHEN AC.action_name IS NULL THEN AC.type_name ELSE AC.action_name END) || ' scheduled by ' || (CASE WHEN WC.login IS NULL THEN '(unknown)' ELSE WC.login END) AS ACTION_NAME, AC.scheduler, WC.login AS SCHEDULER_NAME, COALESCE(AC.in_progress_systems, 0) AS "IN_PROGRESS_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.completed_systems, 0) AS "COMPLETED_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.failed_systems, 0) AS "FAILED_SYSTEMS" FROM actionCounts AC LEFT JOIN web_contact WC on AC.scheduler = WC.id WHERE AC.completed_systems > 0 ORDER BY EARLIEST DESC

mode.name: failed_action_list
mode.query: WITH actionCounts AS ( SELECT id AS action_id, MAX(earliest_action) AS earliest_action, MAX(type_name) AS type_name, MAX(action_name) AS action_name, MAX(scheduler) AS scheduler, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id IN (0, 1)) AS in_progress_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 2) AS completed_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 3) AS failed_systems FROM rhnUserActionOverview WHERE user_id = :user_id AND org_id = :org_id AND archived = 0 GROUP BY id ) SELECT AC.action_id AS ID, AC.earliest_action AS EARLIEST, AC.type_name, (CASE WHEN AC.action_name IS NULL THEN AC.type_name ELSE AC.action_name END) || ' scheduled by ' || (CASE WHEN WC.login IS NULL THEN '(unknown)' ELSE WC.login END) AS ACTION_NAME, AC.scheduler, WC.login AS SCHEDULER_NAME, COALESCE(AC.in_progress_systems, 0) AS "IN_PROGRESS_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.completed_systems, 0) AS "COMPLETED_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.failed_systems, 0) AS "FAILED_SYSTEMS" FROM actionCounts AC LEFT JOIN web_contact WC on AC.scheduler = WC.id WHERE AC.failed_systems > 0 ORDER BY EARLIEST DESC

mode.name: archived_action_list
mode.query: WITH actionCounts AS ( SELECT id AS action_id, MAX(earliest_action) AS earliest_action, MAX(type_name) AS type_name, MAX(action_name) AS action_name, MAX(scheduler) AS scheduler, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id IN (0, 1)) AS in_progress_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 2) AS completed_systems, SUM(tally) FILTER (WHERE action_status_id = 3) AS failed_systems FROM rhnUserActionOverview WHERE org_id = :org_id AND (user_id = :user_id OR (:include_orphans = 'Y' AND user_id IS NULL)) AND archived = 1 GROUP BY id ) SELECT AC.action_id AS ID, AC.earliest_action AS EARLIEST, AC.type_name, (CASE WHEN AC.action_name IS NULL THEN AC.type_name ELSE AC.action_name END) || ' scheduled by ' || (CASE WHEN WC.login IS NULL THEN '(unknown)' ELSE WC.login END) AS ACTION_NAME, WC.login AS SCHEDULER_NAME, COALESCE(AC.in_progress_systems, 0) AS "IN_PROGRESS_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.completed_systems, 0) AS "COMPLETED_SYSTEMS", COALESCE(AC.failed_systems, 0) AS "FAILED_SYSTEMS" FROM actionCounts AC LEFT JOIN web_contact WC on AC.scheduler = WC.id ORDER BY EARLIEST DESC

write-mode.name: archive_actions
write-mode.query: UPDATE rhnAction SET archived = 1 WHERE id IN (SELECT element FROM rhnSet WHERE user_id = :user_id AND label = :label) AND org_id = :org_id

write-mode.name: delete_actions
write-mode.query: DELETE FROM rhnAction WHERE id IN (SELECT element FROM rhnSet WHERE user_id = :user_id AND label = :label) AND org_id = :org_id

write-mode.name: delete_actions_by_id_and_type
write-mode.query: DELETE FROM rhnAction WHERE id = :id AND action_type = :action_type

write-mode.name: schedule_action
write-mode.query: INSERT INTO rhnActionPackage (id, action_id, parameter, name_id, evr_id, package_arch_id) VALUES (sequence_nextval('rhn_act_p_id_seq'), :action_id, :pkg_parameter, :name_id, :evr_id, :arch_id)

write-mode.name: insert_package_delta_element

query.params: delta_id, operation, n, e, v, r, a

write-mode.query: INSERT INTO rhnPackageDeltaElement (package_delta_id, transaction_package_id) VALUES (:delta_id, lookup_transaction_package(:operation, :n, :e, :v, :r, :a))

mode.name: visible_to_user
mode.query: SELECT 1 FROM rhnUserActionOverview UAO WHERE (UAO.user_id = :user_id OR (:include_orphans = 'Y' AND UAO.user_id IS NULL)) AND UAO.id = :aid AND UAO.org_id = :org_id
